channel.title: HCI Medical Group — Health Resources
channel.description: Health tips, medical insights, and wellness resources from HCI Medical Group in Pasadena.

item.title: Getting Ready for Flu Season: Your Complete Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about protecting yourself and your family during flu season, including when to get vaccinated and when to see your doctor.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: Remote Patient Monitoring: How It Works and Who Benefits
item.description: Learn how remote patient monitoring uses everyday devices to help your doctor track your health between visits—and why it matters for chronic conditions.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: Preventive Health Screenings You Need at Every Age
item.description: A practical guide to the health screenings recommended at every stage of adulthood, from your 20s through your senior years.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: How Chronic Care Management Helps You Stay Healthier at Home
item.description: Discover how Medicare's Chronic Care Management program provides ongoing support between doctor visits for patients with multiple chronic conditions.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: What to Expect at Your First Visit to HCI Medical Group
item.description: New to HCI Medical Group? Here's everything you need to know about your first appointment, from what to bring to what we'll cover together.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: Understanding High Blood Pressure: What Your Numbers Mean
item.description: Learn how to read your blood pressure numbers, understand the risks of hypertension, and discover what you can do to keep your heart healthy.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: A Patient's Guide to Managing Type 2 Diabetes
item.description: Practical steps for managing type 2 diabetes, from blood sugar monitoring to lifestyle changes that make a real difference.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)

item.title: Understanding Your Medicare Annual Wellness Visit
item.description: Learn what to expect during your Medicare Annual Wellness Visit and how this free preventive benefit can help you stay healthy.
item.author: care@hcimed.com (HCI Medical Group)
